mechanics.excerpt: Deluxe Tool Klt: Where the basic tool kit is enough for sim- ple jobs, the deluxe tool kit contains everything else profes sional mechanic Or tradesman needs Many of the basic tools are duplicated this kit, but multitude of additiona special: ized tools, including many powered tools and accessories are also included_ Tne deluxe tool kit comes with Its own portable storage container; character performing any Technician Skill not only avoids Lack of Proper Equiprent Modifier but also gains TN Modifier for using deluxe kit.
